status.description: Final status of the pipeline execution

generated_files.description: List of generated report drafts and final PDFs (e.g., F-6, F-7, F-19-1)

review_log_path.description: Path to the Dual-Agent Review Rounds Log

figure_audit_log_path.description: Path to the visual asset verification audit log (required for F-19-1)

carryover_funds_justified.description: Indicates if the '次年度使用額が生じた理由と使用計画' section was generated

warnings.description: Any non-fatal warnings encountered during execution (e.g., byte limit warnings)
